tools.name: outlook_rules
tools.description: List, create, or delete Outlook inbox message rules for automatic mail processing. Include a confidence score (0-1) for create and delete actions.

display_name.description: Display name for the rule (required for create)

move_to_folder.description: Action: move to folder ID (for create)

forward_to.description: Action: forward to email address(es) (for create)

stop_processing.description: Action: stop processing subsequent rules (for create)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_vacation
tools.description: Get, enable, or disable Outlook automatic reply (out-of-office) settings. Include a confidence score (0-1) for enable and disable actions.

internal_message.description: Auto-reply message for internal (same organization) senders (required for enable)

external_message.description: Auto-reply message for external senders (for enable)

external_audience.description: Who receives the external auto-reply: none, contactsOnly, or all (default none)

start_date.description: Scheduled start date/time in ISO 8601 format (for enable with schedule)

end_date.description: Scheduled end date/time in ISO 8601 format (for enable with schedule)

time_zone.description: IANA time zone for scheduled dates (default: system timezone)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
